decks.notes: This deck focuses on establishing early board presence with aggressive creatures like Aang, Swift Savior and Floodpits Drowner. It also utilizes powerful spells like Seam Rip and Parting Gust to control the game and protect its creatures. The deck's mana base includes Floodfarm Verge and Hallowed Fountain to ensure smooth mana production. Ajani, Outland Chaperone and Voice of Victory provide additional combat support, while Wan Shi Tong, Librarian offers card advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a mix of creatures, control spells, and combat tricks.

The deck focuses on utilizing the combination of reanimation spells and powerful creatures to overwhelm the opponent. By dumping creatures into the graveyard and then bringing them back using cards like Bitter Triumph and Restless Reef, the player can quickly build a threatening board presence. Cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Overlord of the Balemurk provide additional threats while Cruel Somnophage and Cruelclaw's Heist disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes utility spells like Multiversal Passage and Quantum Riddler to help set up the combo.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By playing cards like Gloomlake Verge and Floodpits Drowner, along with powerful creatures like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Spyglass Siren, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early on and control the board. The inclusion of cards like Requiting Hex and Restless Reef adds additional versatility to the deck, allowing it to adapt to different situations while maintaining an aggressive strategy. Overall, the deck focuses on speed and disruption to outpace the opponent and secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through spell interaction and board manipulation, utilizing powerful cards like Burst Lightning and Full Bore to maintain dominance. With a mix of creatures and spells, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up its own resources. The mana base includes lands that provide flexibility and consistency, allowing the player to adapt to various situations. Overall, the deck's strategy revolves around maintaining control of the game state and overpowering the opponent with well-timed plays and efficient resource management.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of countermagic, removal spells, and card advantage. It leverages the Izzet colors to manipulate the board state and disrupt the opponent's strategy while developing its own game plan. The deck includes powerful control tools such as Spell Snare and Iroh's Demonstration, along with card draw options like Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent. By maximizing efficiency and resource management, this deck aims to outlast its opponent and emerge victorious through careful planning and precise execution.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counter spells, removal, and card draw. The goal is to use cards like Spell Snare and Spell Pierce to disrupt your opponent's strategy while using cards like Burst Lightning and Hearth Elemental to remove threats from the board. The deck also includes card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand to help maintain a full hand of options. With a mix of control elements and efficient creatures, this deck aims to gain and maintain control of the game until victory is achieved.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive creatures in the early game. The key strategy involves ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to play powerful threats such as Ba Sing Se and Badgermole Cub. Glimpse the Core and Sapling Nursery help to maintain card advantage and replenish the board with more creatures. Escape Tunnel and Esper Origins provide additional utility and protection for key creatures, while Fabled Passage and Mightform Harmonizer offer flexibility and consistency in the deck's gameplay.

This deck focuses on aggressive play by using low-cost spells to control the board and deal damage quickly. The key strategy is to use cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand to dig for more spells while utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to burn the opponent's creatures and life total. The deck also includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Unsummon to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By applying early pressure and leveraging spell efficiency, this deck aims to close out games swiftly.

The deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with disruptive spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. By utilizing cards like Bitterbloom Bearer and Deep-Cavern Bat, along with removal spells like Shoot the Sheriff and Requiting Hex, the deck aims to maintain a strong presence on the battlefield while disrupting the opponent's strategy. With a mix of evasive creatures and efficient removal, the deck can quickly overwhelm the opponent and close out the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main strategy of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw to maintain board advantage and disrupt the opponent's plays. The deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan while building up its own resources and eventually overpowering them with powerful creatures like Hearth Elemental and Eddymurk Crab. Multiversal Passage and Spider-Sense provide additional ways to access different cards and options, while Burst Lightning and Spell Snare offer versatile answers to various threats. The key is to outlast the opponent and win through patient, calculated plays.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on quickly building up board presence and controlling the opponent's resources through a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By efficiently deploying threats like Floodpits Drowner and Deep-Cavern Bat, while also utilizing spells like Spell Snare and Shoot the Sheriff to hinder the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own strategy. With a balanced mix of aggression and disruption, this deck aims to maintain tempo and pressure throughout the game to secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and utilizing ramp cards to accelerate mana production. The key strategy is to establish a strong board presence early on with efficient threats like Ba Sing Se and Badgermole Cub, while also utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to further pressure the opponent. By efficiently ramping into powerful creatures and maintaining pressure with multiple threats, this deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing powerful cards like Gloomlake Verge and Floodpits Drowner, it aims to control the pace of the game while dealing consistent damage. The inclusion of Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and spyglass siren adds a level of disruption to the opponent's game plan. The deck also utilizes cards like Enduring Curiosity and Soulstone Sanctuary to maintain card advantage and keep the pressure on the opponent. With a mix of efficient threats and control elements, this deck aims to win quickly and decisively.

This deck focuses on using a combination of control spells and abilities to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up card advantage and resource management. The key strategy revolves around using cards like Abandon Attachments, Accumulate Wisdom, and Spell Snare to control the battlefield, while utilizing powerful spells like Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique to deal with threats. The deck also includes cards like Agna Qel'a and Riverpyre Verge to generate additional value and maintain a strong board presence. Ultimately, the goal is to outmaneuver and outlast the opponent by efficiently managing resources and controlling the game.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and using efficient spells to control the board and deal damage to the opponent. It includes cards that provide card advantage and tempo advantages, allowing the player to quickly close out the game and overwhelm their opponent. The deck also includes cards that can provide extra mana or protection for key creatures, allowing for explosive turns and unexpected plays. With a mix of direct damage, card draw, and efficient creatures, this deck aims to consistently apply pressure and outmaneuver the opponent.

The main focus of this Temur Control deck is to efficiently manage and control the game through a combination of removal spells, card draw, and mana acceleration. By utilizing cards like Spell Snare, Burst Lightning, and Earthbender Ascension, the deck can disrupt opponents' strategies and maintain board presence. Consult the Star Charts and Stock Up provide card advantage, while Icetill Explorer and Mightform Harmonizer help ramp up mana production. This allows the player to play powerful threats like Wan Shi Tong, Librarian and Thunder Magic to close out the game. The deck aims to outlast opponents through resource management and strategic plays.
